description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly black body accented by striking red highlights along the handguard, receiver, grip, and stock. The rifle is equipped with a collapsible stock, allowing for adjustable length to suit different users or scenarios. Its barrel is standard in length and capped with a metallic muzzle device, likely a flash hider, for reduced muzzle flash. The handguard has a series of vent holes and a rail system for mounting accessories. The magazine is a detachable box type, partially visible and finished in metallic silver. Iron sights are mounted on the top rail, providing basic aiming capability.
description: A modern black and red tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, standard barrel, detachable box magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle device, handguard vent holes, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full profile, including the collapsible stock, red accents, detachable magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock, pistol grip, and the rear sight alignment.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the stock, magazine, and detailed red highlights.
